name: Executive Helper
description: Executive Helper is a declarative agent that automates meeting preparation by researching public information about participants and generating comprehensive executive bios with career insights.

conversation_starters.title: Create executive bio
conversation_starters.text: I am preparing for a first-time introduction with Michael Chen, CFO of Microsoft Asia. Provide a short profile and five rapport-building questions.

conversation_starters.title: Meeting preparation
conversation_starters.text: I have a strategic meeting next week with the CEO of Contoso. Help me prepare by creating a comprehensive bio.

conversation_starters.title: Quick bio lookup
conversation_starters.text: Create a bio for Jane Smith, VP of Engineering at Fabrikam.

conversation_starters.title: Networking prep
conversation_starters.text: I'm attending a networking event and will meet several executives. Start with a bio for the keynote speaker.

conversation_starters.title: Advisory meeting prep
conversation_starters.text: I have an advisory board meeting coming up. Help me understand the background of our new board member.

conversation_starters.title: Research a participant
conversation_starters.text: I have a meeting with John Doe, Senior Product Manager. What can you tell me about his background and expertise?
